home.title: Book your Sette Lune transfers
home.intro: Piazza Sant'Agostino, Trapani – meeting point for all departures. Choose the rides you need for each day: you can book several days in a single payment.
home.secretLocationNotice: Secret location: the exact location will be revealed on the day of the event.
home.addedNotice: Added to cart! You can keep choosing transfers for other days, and go to the

cart.title: Your cart
cart.empty: Your cart is empty. Go back to the transfers page to add a booking.
cart.name: Full name
cart.email: Email (you'll receive your confirmation and booking code here)
cart.unavailableNotice: Some items in your cart are no longer available in the requested quantity. Reduce the number of people or remove the row before continuing.
cart.emailMismatch: The two email addresses do not match.
cart.errorGeneric: Please check your details and try again.
cart.paymentCancelled: Payment was cancelled. The seats have been released, you can try again whenever you like.

confirmation.codeNotice: Keep this code: you'll be asked for it before boarding the transfer.
confirmation.pendingNotice: Your payment is being verified, this page will update automatically. If nothing changes within a minute, please check your email.
confirmation.failedNotice: The payment failed or expired. The seats have been released, you can try again from your cart.
confirmation.emailSentNotice: We've sent you a confirmation email with all the details.
